Electrician in Rosedale, CA

Trusted local professionals serving Rosedale and surrounding communities

Serving Rosedale, CA

Briceno Electric is dedicated to serving the Rosedale community with comprehensive electrical services. We offer a full range of solutions, including electrical repairs, installations, and upgrades, tailored to meet the specific needs of our clients. Our team is equipped with the latest tools and technology to ensure efficient and effective service. As a trusted electrical provider in the Bakersfield area, Briceno Electric is committed to providing exceptional customer service and reliable solutions. We understand the importance of safety and quality workmanship, and we always go the extra mile to exceed expectations. We are a phone call away from helping with your electrical needs.

Rosedale is a growing suburban community located northwest of Bakersfield, known for its family-friendly atmosphere.

Electrician Services in Rosedale

Electrical Repairs

Fast and reliable electrical repair services for your home or business.

Electrical Installations

Expert electrical installation services for new construction and remodels.

Enhance your home with custom lighting design and installation services.

Learn more →

Whole-House Surge Protection

Protect your electronics with whole-house surge protection.

Learn more →

EV Charger Installation

Professional installation of electric vehicle (EV) chargers for your home.
